prompt: Redraw the OCRAgent brand banner as a colored-pencil hand-drawn hero image for a GitHub README. Show a brass balance scale: one pan holds documents, a bamboo slip bundle, a parchment scroll, and a USB drive; the other pan holds gold, silver, and copper coins. Add the project title and exact slogan text.
style: warm colored-pencil illustration on lightly textured paper, refined but handmade, GitHub README hero quality
composition: wide landscape banner, scale on the left, title block on the right, generous margins, clean hierarchy, no card frame
palette: warm paper, brass gold, ink blue, muted green, silver, copper
text:
OCRAgent
OCR-first, agent-guided.
何须一模破万卷，智能调度在慧枢。
constraints: render all text verbatim; spell OCRAgent exactly; keep the title legible at README width; no extra slogans; no watermark; no logos other than the OCRAgent mark; avoid dark blurred stock-image style

prompt: Redraw the OCRAgent core value comparison as a two-panel colored-pencil infographic for a GitHub README. Left panel shows a single-parser OCR machine forcing mixed files through one path with wasted coins and rejected pages. Right panel shows OCRAgent using the four-step flow Grade, Route, Parse, Review to choose suitable tools by difficulty, cost, availability, and quality before accepting output.
style: clear colored-pencil infographic, hand-drawn but readable, lightly textured paper, restrained labels
composition: wide two-column comparison; left panel about one third, right panel about two thirds; simple arrows; no dense paragraphs; outputs along the bottom
palette: paper white, graphite gray, brass gold, ink blue, muted green, red only for failure marks
text:
One parser for all
OCRAgent

Parse
Review
Cost
Quality
PDF text
OCR
VLM
Pandoc
User tool
UTF-8 text
constraints: render text verbatim; include the four steps Grade, Route, Parse, Review; show output as UTF-8 text rather than only Markdown; no extra labels; no tiny unreadable text; no watermark; avoid depicting OCRAgent as only a router

prompt: Redraw the README architecture diagram for OCRAgent as a compact colored-pencil system diagram. Show command boundary at the top with CLI commands and bare ocragent Autonomous Mode. Show a deterministic command layer for prepare, init tools, init docs, run, summarize. Show one tool registry boundary containing builtin tools and generated user_toolbox.py with scopes previewer, parser, reviewer. Show agent loops for init_tools, parser, reviewer above the tool boundary. Show local state files user_toolbox.py, .ocragent_memory.txt, ocragent.log, and ocragent_results. Emphasize that agents select and review through tools while deterministic code owns paths, config, logging, validation, and output writes.
style: colored-pencil technical infographic, clean boxes and arrows, hand-drawn but precise, readable at README width
composition: landscape architecture diagram with four horizontal bands: CLI, commands, agents and tools, local state and outputs; use arrows sparingly; no decorative nesting
palette: paper white, ink blue for command boundary, green for tools, amber for agent loops, gray for state, red only for review failure/retry
text:

constraints: render text verbatim; do not put OCRAgent Router as the sole center of the system; include prepare and summarize; include Autonomous Mode; no vendor logos; no watermark; no tiny labels; arrows must be coherent

prompt: Redraw the detailed OCRAgent system architecture diagram as a high-readability colored-pencil technical poster for developer documentation. Preserve the multi-dimensional encoding idea: interaction channel, capability type, logic pattern, and compute nature. Update the user flow to start with bare ocragent and optional explicit commands. Include Autonomous Mode start-point selection, prepare, init tools, init docs, run, summarize. Include config sources environment variables, .env, cwd settings, home settings, package defaults. Include tool registry with builtin tools and generated user tools, scopes previewer/parser/reviewer, cost, secrets, flags, and availability. Include agentic loop modes tool_calls and pseudo-XML. Show parser review loop and reviewer repair loop, with deterministic validators around model output.
style: precise colored-pencil technical diagram, hand-drawn texture with professional information design, developer-guide quality
composition: large landscape poster; central layered architecture; left legend and user flow; right agent-loop modes and configuration hierarchy; bottom resources and generated state; clean alignment and readable labels
palette: paper white, blue for command/system boundaries, green for tools and generated user extensions, amber for agents/LLM judgment, gray for utilities/state, purple for local compute, soft orange for AI compute
